query:
SELECT id, name, category, 
CASE 
  WHEN photos IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
  WHEN photos = '' THEN 'EMPTY'
  WHEN photos LIKE '%manuscdn%' THEN 'HAS_CDN'
  ELSE SUBSTRING(photos, 1, 30)
END as photo_status
FROM products 
ORDER BY category, name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT id, name, category, 
CASE 
  WHEN photos IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
  WHEN photos = '' THEN 'EMPTY'
  WHEN photos LIKE '%manuscdn%' THEN 'HAS_CDN'
  ELSE SUBSTRING(photos, 1, 30)
END as photo_status
FROM products 
ORDER BY category, name;
